task: In PowerShell run: & 'C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Arma Reforger Tools\Workbench\ArmaReforgerWorkbenchSteamDiag.exe' '-gproj' 'C:\Users\pfofa\Documents\my games\ArmaReforger\addons\elos-plugin\addon.gproj' - then wait 35 seconds - then click Plugins in top menu bar - screenshot - look for 'AI Generate Mission' entry specifically - if found PASS - if not found scroll down in menu or check submenus - report all menu items visible - close Workbench Alt+F4

text: I'll start by taking a screenshot to see the current state of the screen.
I can see the PowerShell window is open. Let me click on it and run the command.
I need to click directly on the PowerShell terminal to focus it. Let me click on the PowerShell window title bar or the text area.
The PowerShell window is focused (I can see the cursor blinking at the prompt). Now I'll type the command to run ArmaReforgerWorkbenchSteamDiag.exe with the specified project file.
The command has been typed in the PowerShell window. I can see it on the last line. Now let me press Enter to execute it.
The command has been executed. Now I need to wait 35 seconds for Arma Reforger Workbench to load.

Excellent! I can see the Enfusion (Arma Reforger Workbench) splash screen is loading! The Enfusion logo is visible, which means the application has started. Now I need to wait 35 seconds for it to fully load.

The Arma Reforger Workbench has fully loaded! I can see the "Enfusion Workbench - ELOS AI Generate Plugin" title bar, which is very promising. I can see the top menu bar with: File, Editors, View, Edit, Window, Utilities, **Plugins**, Help. Now I need to click on "Plugins" in the top menu bar.

The Plugins menu is now open. I can see the following menu items:
- **Settings** (with a submenu arrow ►)
- **Batch resource processor**
- **Image Set Generator**
- **Re-Save Meta Tool**
- **Re-Save Tool**
- **Run Tracy Profiler**

I do NOT see "AI Generate Mission" directly in this list. Let me check the "Settings" submenu as it has an arrow indicating a submenu. But first, let me take a proper screenshot of this state.
Good, I can clearly see the Plugins menu. Now let me hover over "Settings" to check its submenu for "AI Generate Mission".

The "Settings" submenu has expanded and shows:
- **Reload WB Scripts** (Ctrl+Shift+R)
- **Clear All Settings**
- **Model Import**
- **Terrain Import**

No "AI Generate Mission" here either. Let me close this submenu and go back to look at the main Plugins menu more carefully. The "AI Generate Mission" is not in the Settings submenu. Let me close the menu and reopen the Plugins menu to get a clean screenshot of all items.
